name: Curried Vegetables and Beans
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Red potatoes, diced (do not peel potatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic, peppers, and onion to the skillet.
3. Saute for about 4 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
4. Sprinkle flour and spices evenly over the mixture.
5. Stir fry for another 20 seconds.
6. Add water and diced potatoes to the skillet.
7. Cover and reduce heat to a simmer.
8. Cook for 20-25 minutes, or until potatoes are tender.
9. Add apples, peas, and garbanzo beans; cover and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Serve hot over cooked brown rice.
Yield: 5-6 servings.
